message: Run tests for PRs, on touched packages only

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -eo pipefail
+
+base_ref="${1:-}"
+
+if [[ -z "$base_ref" ]]; then
+  printf '.\n'
+  exit 0
+fi
+
+if ! diff_output=$(git diff --name-only "${base_ref}"...HEAD 2>/dev/null); then
+  printf '.\n'
+  exit 0
+fi
+
+candidate_lines=$(printf '%s\n' "$diff_output" | awk -F/ 'NF>1 && $1 !~ /^\./ {print $1}' | sort -u)
+
+filtered=()
+while IFS= read -r candidate; do
+  [[ -z "$candidate" ]] && continue
+  if [[ -f "$candidate/package.yaml" ]]; then
+    filtered+=("$candidate")
+  fi
+done <<< "$candidate_lines"
+
+if (( ${#filtered[@]} == 0 )); then
+  printf '\n'
+else
+  printf '%s\n' "${filtered[*]}"
+fi

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -eo pipefail
+
+workspace="$(pwd)"
+packages=("$@")
+
+docker run --rm \
+  -e UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache \
+  -e XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/xdg-data \
+  -v "${workspace}:/workspace" \
+  -w /workspace \
+  --entrypoint uv \
+  tenzir/tenzir tool run tenzir-test "${packages[@]}"

@@ -2,20 +2,28 @@ name: Tests
 
 on:
   workflow_dispatch:
+  pull_request:
 
 jobs:
   tenzir-test:
+    name: Test packages
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Check out repository
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
+
+      - name: Detect touched packages
+        id: touched
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          packages=$(./.github/scripts/detect-touched-packages.sh "${{ github.event.pull_request.base.sha || '' }}")
+          echo "packages=$packages" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
 
       - name: Run package tests
+        if: steps.touched.outputs.packages != ''
+        shell: bash
         run: |
-          docker run --rm \
-            -e UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache \
-            -e XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/xdg-data \
-            -v "${{ github.workspace }}:/workspace" \
-            -w /workspace \
-            --entrypoint uv \
-            tenzir/tenzir tool run tenzir-test .
+          set -eo pipefail
+          ./.github/scripts/run-tenzir-test.sh ${{ steps.touched.outputs.packages }}
